title: Cinematic Pack
description: The perfect modpack for YouTubers or those who enjoy filmmaking in Minecraft, this modpack is based on the ReplayMod.
body:
# Cinematic Pack
A mod pack that includes shaders, resource packs, and mods that add support for various animated textures, optimization, etc. This pack is perfect for starting out; you just need to install FFmpeg according to the official ReplayMod guide.

---

## REQUIRED TO USE THIS PACK, READ THIS!!
To render videos with ReplayMod, you need to add FFmpeg to your Minecraft folder. The full guide is available here:

https://www.replaymod.com/docs/#installing-ffmpeg

---

The pack includes initial textures that are similar to those in the official Minecraft trailers.

---

The mod pack will definitely be optimized as I find cool mods for animations or decorations that can enhance your cinematics.

---

**REMEMBER!** The mod pack does not need to be installed on the server [V1]; all mods are client-side, and you can record with friends who don’t have these mods. It’s important that the person responsible for rendering, etc., is using this pack on the server.
However, for better immersion, it’s best if your friends use the same textures and shaders so they can better get into character. ;)

[V2] The pack got new furniture, etc. This version of the pack needs to be uploaded to the server so we can 'use' friends for role-playing. ;)
